# Docusaurus Quick Reference

> CLI commands, front matter fields, and configuration options for Docusaurus 3.x. See [SKILL.md](SKILL.md) for core patterns and [examples/](examples/) for practical examples.

---

## CLI Commands

### Development & Build

| Command                            | Purpose                           |
| ---------------------------------- | --------------------------------- |
| `npx docusaurus start`             | Start dev server with hot reload  |
| `npx docusaurus start --port 4000` | Start on custom port              |
| `npx docusaurus build`             | Production build to `build/`      |
| `npx docusaurus serve`             | Serve production build locally    |
| `npx docusaurus clear`             | Clear generated assets and caches |

### Content Management

| Command                             | Purpose                                           |
| ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| `npx docusaurus docs:version 1.0.0` | Snapshot current docs as version 1.0.0            |
| `npx docusaurus write-translations` | Extract translatable strings to `i18n/` directory |
| `npx docusaurus write-heading-ids`  | Add explicit heading IDs to all docs              |

### Swizzling

| Command                                                             | Purpose                        |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `npx docusaurus swizzle --list`                                     | List all swizzlable components |
| `npx docusaurus swizzle [theme] [component] -- --wrap`              | Wrap a component (recommended) |
| `npx docusaurus swizzle [theme] [component] -- --eject`             | Eject a component (full copy)  |
| `npx docusaurus swizzle @docusaurus/theme-classic Footer -- --wrap` | Wrap the Footer component      |

### Deployment

| Command                                        | Purpose                                       |
| ---------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `npx docusaurus deploy`                        | Deploy to GitHub Pages (uses config settings) |
| `npx docusaurus build && npx docusaurus serve` | Build and preview before deploying            |

---

## Doc Front Matter Fields

| Field                    | Type         | Purpose                                            |
| ------------------------ | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`                  | string       | Page title (used in sidebar if no `sidebar_label`) |
| `description`            | string       | SEO meta description                               |
| `sidebar_position`       | number       | Order in autogenerated sidebar                     |
| `sidebar_label`          | string       | Override label shown in sidebar                    |
| `sidebar_class_name`     | string       | CSS class for sidebar item                         |
| `sidebar_custom_props`   | object       | Custom data accessible in swizzled components      |
| `slug`                   | string       | Override URL path segment                          |
| `tags`                   | string[]     | Document tags for grouping and filtering           |
| `draft`                  | boolean      | Exclude from production build                      |
| `unlisted`               | boolean      | Build but hide from sidebar and search             |
| `hide_title`             | boolean      | Hide the `# Title` heading                         |
| `hide_table_of_contents` | boolean      | Hide the right-side TOC                            |
| `custom_edit_url`        | string       | Override the "Edit this page" link                 |
| `keywords`               | string[]     | SEO keywords meta tag                              |
| `image`                  | string       | OpenGraph / social sharing image                   |
| `last_update`            | object       | `{ date, author }` for manual last-updated info    |
| `pagination_prev`        | string\|null | Override previous page link (null to hide)         |
| `pagination_next`        | string\|null | Override next page link (null to hide)             |

---

## Blog Front Matter Fields

| Field                    | Type          | Purpose                              |
| ------------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `title`                  | string        | Post title                           |
| `description`            | string        | SEO description and feed summary     |
| `slug`                   | string        | Override URL path                    |
| `date`                   | string        | Publication date (ISO format)        |
| `authors`                | string\|array | Author key(s) from `authors.yml`     |
| `tags`                   | string[]      | Blog tags                            |
| `draft`                  | boolean       | Exclude from production build        |
| `unlisted`               | boolean       | Build but hide from listings         |
| `hide_table_of_contents` | boolean       | Hide right-side TOC                  |
| `toc_min_heading_level`  | number        | Min heading level in TOC (default 2) |
| `toc_max_heading_level`  | number        | Max heading level in TOC (default 3) |
| `truncate_marker`        | string        | Custom `<!-- truncate -->` marker    |

---

## Preset-Classic Options

| Key       | Plugin                             | Purpose                    | Disable  |
| --------- | ---------------------------------- | -------------------------- | -------- |
| `docs`    | `@docusaurus/plugin-content-docs`  | Documentation pages        | `false`  |
| `blog`    | `@docusaurus/plugin-content-blog`  | Blog pages                 | `false`  |
| `pages`   | `@docusaurus/plugin-content-pages` | Custom React/MDX pages     | `false`  |
| `sitemap` | `@docusaurus/plugin-sitemap`       | XML sitemap generation     | `false`  |
| `theme`   | `@docusaurus/theme-classic`        | Default theme              | N/A      |
| `svgr`    | `@docusaurus/plugin-svgr`          | SVG as React components    | `false`  |
| `gtag`    | `@docusaurus/plugin-google-gtag`   | Google Analytics (gtag.js) | omit key |
| `debug`   | `@docusaurus/plugin-debug`         | Debug panel (dev only)     | `false`  |

---

## Docs Plugin Key Options

| Option                  | Type       | Default             | Purpose                                        |
| ----------------------- | ---------- | ------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `path`                  | string     | `'docs'`            | Filesystem path to docs directory              |
| `routeBasePath`         | string     | `'docs'`            | URL base path (`'/'` for docs-only mode)       |
| `sidebarPath`           | string     | `'sidebars.js'`     | Path to sidebar config file                    |
| `editUrl`               | string\|fn | undefined           | Base URL for "Edit this page" links            |
| `showLastUpdateAuthor`  | boolean    | `false`             | Show git author of last update                 |
| `showLastUpdateTime`    | boolean    | `false`             | Show git timestamp of last update              |
| `breadcrumbs`           | boolean    | `true`              | Show breadcrumb navigation                     |
| `include`               | string[]   | `['**/*.{md,mdx}']` | File patterns to include                       |
| `exclude`               | string[]   | `['**/_*/**']`      | File patterns to exclude                       |
| `remarkPlugins`         | array      | `[]`                | Custom remark MDX plugins                      |
| `rehypePlugins`         | array      | `[]`                | Custom rehype MDX plugins                      |
| `disableVersioning`     | boolean    | `false`             | Disable version dropdown and routing           |
| `includeCurrentVersion` | boolean    | `true`              | Include the `current` (working copy) version   |
| `lastVersion`           | string     | latest              | Which version to serve at the base path        |
| `onlyIncludeVersions`   | string[]   | all                 | Subset of versions to build (speeds up dev)    |
| `versions`              | object     | `{}`                | Per-version config (`label`, `path`, `banner`) |
| `numberPrefixParser`    | fn\|false  | default             | Parse `01-intro.md` number prefixes            |
| `sidebarItemsGenerator` | fn         | default             | Custom sidebar generation logic                |

---

## Theme Config Options

### Navbar

| Option         | Type    | Purpose                                                   |
| -------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`        | string  | Site title in navbar                                      |
| `logo`         | object  | `{ alt, src, srcDark, href, width, height }`              |
| `items`        | array   | Navigation items (links, dropdowns, docs version, search) |
| `hideOnScroll` | boolean | Auto-hide navbar when scrolling down                      |
| `style`        | string  | `'primary'` or `'dark'`                                   |

### Docs Sidebar

| Option                                | Type    | Default | Purpose                                        |
| ------------------------------------- | ------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `docs.sidebar.hideable`               | boolean | `false` | Allow collapsing the entire sidebar            |
| `docs.sidebar.autoCollapseCategories` | boolean | `false` | Collapse other categories when one is expanded |

### Color Mode

| Option                                | Type    | Default   | Purpose                |
| ------------------------------------- | ------- | --------- | ---------------------- |
| `colorMode.defaultMode`               | string  | `'light'` | Default theme mode     |
| `colorMode.disableSwitch`             | boolean | `false`   | Hide dark/light toggle |
| `colorMode.respectPrefersColorScheme` | boolean | `false`   | Follow OS preference   |

### Table of Contents

| Option                            | Type   | Default | Purpose                        |
| --------------------------------- | ------ | ------- | ------------------------------ |
| `tableOfContents.minHeadingLevel` | number | `2`     | Min heading level in right TOC |
| `tableOfContents.maxHeadingLevel` | number | `3`     | Max heading level in right TOC |

---

## Import Aliases

| Alias              | Resolves To                               | Purpose                        |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------ |
| `@site/`           | Project root                              | Import from project files      |
| `@theme/`          | Current theme component                   | Import theme components in MDX |
| `@theme-original/` | Original theme component (before swizzle) | Import in swizzle wrappers     |
| `@docusaurus/`     | Docusaurus core packages                  | Hooks, utils, router           |

### Common `@docusaurus/` Imports

| Import                             | Purpose                                   |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `@docusaurus/Link`                 | Client-side navigation link               |
| `@docusaurus/useDocusaurusContext` | Access site config and metadata           |
| `@docusaurus/useBaseUrl`           | Resolve paths relative to `baseUrl`       |
| `@docusaurus/BrowserOnly`          | Render component only on client side      |
| `@docusaurus/ExecutionEnvironment` | Check if running in browser vs SSR        |
| `@docusaurus/Head`                 | Add elements to `<head>` (SEO, meta tags) |

---

## Admonition Types

| Type    | Keyword      | Color  | Use For                           |
| ------- | ------------ | ------ | --------------------------------- |
| Note    | `:::note`    | Grey   | Supplementary information         |
| Tip     | `:::tip`     | Green  | Best practices, recommendations   |
| Info    | `:::info`    | Blue   | Context, background information   |
| Warning | `:::warning` | Orange | Potential issues, deprecations    |
| Danger  | `:::danger`  | Red    | Breaking changes, critical errors |

**Custom title:** `:::tip[My Custom Title]`
